utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes all 5 top-level items. Next, verify if each is fully specified with all details as per the format description: (1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with explicit plan names and monthly costs, plus a total monthly health cost—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: includes home and contents insurance with explicit monthly costs and a total—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs (family, business, and project-specific), with monthly and project-specific costs—fully specified. (4) additional_services: lists enhancement services with costs and a total—fully specified. (5) total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown, plus project costs—fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each named item in the final coverage plan to the closest exact option in the ground-truth listings. Items that appear in the final plan but are not present in the ground-truth catalog (e.g., HealthFirst Premium, Premium Medical Network, 24/7 Travel Assistance, WellMind Family Plan, ParisHome Luxury Coverage, Fine Art & Electronics Protection, Enhanced Family Travel Coverage, Business Travel Support Upgrade, Tokyo/Singapore Concierge Services) cannot be mapped unless there is an exact name match. The only exact matches found are: Premium Medical Network (in travel_enhancement_services), 24/7 Travel Assistance (in travel_enhancement_services). All other named plans in the final plan do not exist verbatim in the ground-truth list, so they cannot be assigned ratings.
